message:
test(runtime): add 10 unit tests for render_thread.rs + fix clippy (bd-36a2u)

Add tests for try_send, check_error, render coalescing, drop-based
shutdown, resize/set_mode handling, multiple logs, OutMsg debug format,
and send-after-shutdown error. Fix 5 pre-existing clippy warnings:
result_large_err, type_complexity (PendingRender type alias),
manual_is_multiple_of. 13 total tests (3 existing + 10 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
